summary: Authentication token attribution bug fix verified. All tests pass - posts are correctly attributed to the logged-in user after logout/re-login cycles.

issues: React key warning: 'Encountered two children with the same key' - duplicate post IDs in feed causing React warnings

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.js logout() correctly clears all tokens (token, auth_token, ceibaa_user)
Login.js handleDemoLogin() correctly clears old tokens before setting new ones
AuthCallback.js correctly clears old tokens before setting new session
VictoryLane.js post creation functions validate token before making API calls
Backend extracts user_id from JWT token's 'sub' claim - no user_id in request body needed
seed_data_creation: Demo users auto-created on first login via /api/auth/demo-login endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication bug fix verified. Key test scenarios: 1) Login clears old tokens before setting new ones, 2) Logout clears all localStorage tokens, 3) Post creation uses JWT token from Authorization header, 4) Backend extracts user_id from JWT 'sub' claim, 5) Multiple login/logout cycles maintain correct user attribution. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend UI flow tested with Playwright - logout/re-login correctly switches user context.

frontend_ui_tests.login_as_demo1: PASS - Token stored, user ID: demo1-uuid
frontend_ui_tests.create_post_as_demo1: PASS - Post attributed to Demo Student 1
frontend_ui_tests.login_as_demo2_after_logout: PASS - Token stored, user ID: demo2-uuid
frontend_ui_tests.create_post_as_demo2: PASS - Post attributed to Demo Student 2
frontend_ui_tests.user_context_switch: PASS - UI shows D2 avatar after re-login

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Posts attributed to wrong user after logout and re-login with different account
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Old tokens not being cleared on logout/login, causing stale user context
fix_applied: AuthContext.js: logout() now clears token, auth_token, ceibaa_user from localStorage
Login.js: handleDemoLogin() clears old tokens before setting new ones
AuthCallback.js: Google auth callback clears old tokens before setting new session
VictoryLane.js: Post creation functions validate token exists and is not 'undefined' or 'null'
bug_fix_verification.verification_result: PASS - All scenarios tested, posts correctly attributed to logged-in user
